App.Title: Pocok Showcase
App.Subtitle: Small .NET packages, exercised against their real APIs.

Home.Title: Small packages, real behavior
Home.Intro: Pocok is a focused .NET package set for explicit infrastructure behavior. This showcase runs trusted repository slices through bounded, per-user sandboxes.
Home.StartText: Each available slice exercises the real package API with editable inputs, bounded execution, and structured results. Start with the first installed slice or choose any available package below.

Package.PlannedTitle: This slice is not implemented yet
Package.PlannedMessage: The package is part of the current catalog, but this deployment does not install an executable slice for it yet. No placeholder output is fabricated.
Package.ContributorGuidance: A contributor can add the slice under samples/Showcase using the established shared contracts, components, localization, and publish discovery.
Package.NotFoundText: The requested package is not part of the current deployment catalog.

Footer.Tagline: Trusted in-process demos with bounded per-user execution.

System.Title: System status
System.Intro: Safe runtime facts for the startup-discovered modules and immutable deployment catalog.

Errors.Title: The request could not be completed
Errors.Text: No internal details were exposed. Return to the package catalog and try again.
Errors.NotFoundText: The requested showcase page does not exist.

Pocok_Conversion.Summary: Policy-driven value conversion with explicit failures, collection support, and bounded behavior.

Pocok_Readiness.Summary: Explicit startup, readiness, failure, cancellation, shutdown, and restart coordination.

Pocok_AppDefaults.Summary: Composable application configurators for consistent host setup.

Pocok_AppDefaults_Logging_Serilog.Summary: Serilog defaults integrated through the Pocok application configurator model.

Pocok_Modularity_Contracts.Summary: Stable service-module contracts shared between hosts and trusted plugins.

Pocok_Modularity.Summary: Manifest-driven startup discovery and registration for trusted in-process modules.

Pocok_AppDefaults_Modularity.Summary: Maintainer defaults for Pocok modularity configuration.

Pocok_BackgroundWork.Summary: Small concurrency helpers for coalescing, debouncing, repetition, and observation.

Pocok_Scripting.Summary: Bounded JavaScript execution with imports, modules, bindings, and structured failures.

Pocok_Localization.Summary: Deterministic file-backed localization and provider composition.

Pocok_Signals.Summary: Typed signal runtime abstractions for reading, writing, subscribing, and connection state.

Pocok_Licensing.Summary: Signed and encrypted license documents, validation, runtime enforcement, and CLI workflows.

Pocok_AppDefaults_Licensing.Summary: Application defaults for configuring and enforcing Pocok licensing.
